plugins.name: hyperfleet-architecture
plugins.description: Provides HyperFleet architecture knowledge for answering questions about design patterns, versioning strategies, and core principles

plugins.name: hyperfleet-jira
plugins.description: JIRA integration for sprint management, task tracking, ticket triage, and story point estimation using jira-cli

plugins.name: hyperfleet-standards
plugins.description: Audits HyperFleet repositories against team architecture standards dynamically fetched from the architecture repo, producing JIRA-ready gap specifications

plugins.name: hyperfleet-operational-readiness
plugins.description: Audits HyperFleet repositories for operational readiness including health probes, dead man's switch metrics, retry logic, PDB, resource limits, and reliability documentation

plugins.name: hyperfleet-devtools
plugins.description: Development assistance tools for HyperFleet - commit message generation, architecture impact analysis, E2E test case design, and more

plugins.name: hyperfleet-code-review
plugins.description: Code review skills for HyperFleet: /review-local reviews local branch changes against HyperFleet standards, architecture checks, and mechanical code patterns. /review-pr provides full PR review with JIRA validation, impact analysis, and interactive recommendations.

plugins.name: hyperfleet-bugs-triage
plugins.description: Interactive JIRA bug triage (New->Backlog) and GitHub issue triage for openshift-hyperfleet repositories
